title: AWS IAM Core Concepts You NEED to Know
note: High-level IAM vocabulary — users, roles, policies, trust. The foundation everything else builds on. Channel: Be A Better Dev.

title: AWS Networking: What is a VPC? - The Amazon Virtual Private Cloud, quickly explained
note: Concise VPC concept overview — subnets, route tables, IGW/NAT — in plain terms. Channel: Dennis Traub (AWS Developer Advocate).

title: Introduction to Amazon VPC (with Console Tutorial)
note: VPC overview with a console walk-through; backup to the quick explainer for those who want to see it built. Channel: Be A Better Dev.

title: AWS S3 Tutorial for Beginners 2023 | AWS S3 Overview | Cloud Computing
note: S3 overview — buckets, storage classes, and the access-control model. Channel: KodeKloud.

title: EC2 for Humans | Amazon Web Services BASICS
note: The what/why of EC2 instances at a conceptual level. Channel: Academind.

title: AWS Lambda in 30 Minutes | Beginner Friendly | 3 Practical Examples included!
note: Serverless model and when to reach for Lambda, with practical examples. Channel: Prof. Ryan Ahmed.

title: Containers on AWS Overview: ECS | EKS | Fargate | ECR
note: The best single conceptual overview of how ECS, EKS, Fargate, and ECR relate. Watch before the per-service container videos. Channel: TechWorld with Nana.

title: An Overview of AWS Elastic Container Service (ECS)
note: ECS concepts overview — clusters, services, tasks, launch types. Channel: Be A Better Dev.

title: Amazon EKS Explained | Amazon Web Services
note: ~5-minute EKS overview — the control-plane / data-plane split. Channel: Amazon Web Services (official).

title: AWS RDS Overview | AWS Tutorial For Beginners
note: RDS overview — engines, Multi-AZ vs read replicas. Channel: Besant Technologies.

title: AWS KMS Masterclass: KMS Key Types, Key Policy, Encryption Context, Key Alias, S3 Bucket Key
note: KMS in depth incl. the key-policy gotcha and S3 Bucket Key. The most on-point KMS video for this round. Channel: knowledgeindia - LearnCloud.

title: AWS Envelope Encryption Explained | Data Encryption Keys (DEK) & KMS
note: Short envelope-encryption / DEK concept refresher. Channel: CloudWolf.

title: AWS Cyber Security Logging Mock Interview | CloudTrail, GuardDuty, CloudWatch Explained
note: Interview-format drill of the detection/logging stack. Channel: Expert Mock Interviews.

title: AWS Guard Duty vs Security Hub | Amazon SIEM CSPM CWPP XDR
note: Clears up the GuardDuty vs Security Hub overlap and the SIEM/CSPM/CWPP/XDR vocabulary. Channel: WissenX Akademie.

title: Using Amazon GuardDuty to continuously monitor and secure your AWS AI workloads
note: Directly relevant to a healthcare-AI imaging platform. Channel: Amazon Web Services (official).

title: AWS Security - IAM | Policy Evaluation for AWS IAM and Resource Policy
note: Drills explicit-deny > allow > implicit-deny and the single-account union nuance — highest-yield IAM concept. Channel: Cloud Security Masterclass.

title: Kubernetes Security Best Practices you need to know
note: K8s cluster hardening fundamentals (RBAC, network policies, pod security). Channel: TechWorld with Nana.

title: Back to Basics: Patterns for Securing Amazon EKS Clusters
note: EKS-specific security patterns. Channel: Amazon Web Services (official).

title: Achieving Healthcare Data Security: AWS HIPAA Compliant Architecture Explained
note: HIPAA-on-AWS architecture overview — shared responsibility, eligible services, encryption/audit. Channel: TechVariable.
